grant_title: Historically Disadvantaged Business Assistance (HDBA) Program Micro-Grants
project_area: Small business startup and expansion costs, capital access, and technical assistance
demographic_requirements: Historically disadvantaged entrepreneurs, including Black- and Latino-owned firms
eligibility_summary: Open to small businesses in Pennsylvania, with a focus on historically disadvantaged entrepreneurs who face barriers to traditional bank loans. Grants are distributed through regional partners including community lenders, economic development groups, and universities.
